query:
INSERT INTO quote_line_items (quote_id, description, part_number, category, quantity, unit_price, line_total, repair_or_replacement, betterment_percentage, betterment_amount) VALUES
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Front Bumper Assembly', 'TOY-BMP-2017-F', 'Body Parts', 1, 450.00, 450.00, 'replacement', 15, 67.50),
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Headlight Assembly (Left)', 'TOY-HL-L-2017', 'Electrical', 1, 320.00, 320.00, 'replacement', 10, 32.00),
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Hood Panel Repair', 'N/A', 'Body Work', 1, 280.00, 280.00, 'repair', 0, 0),
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Paint Work (3 panels)', 'N/A', 'Paint', 3, 120.00, 360.00, 'repair', 0, 0),
((SELECT id FROM panel_beater_quotes WHERE claim_id = 30007 AND panel_beater_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'panelbeater@kinga.com')), 'Labor and Installation', 'N/A', 'Labor', 1, 200.00, 200.00, 'repair', 0, 0);
